properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 59/14
BARENTS SEA
1. THE SEISMIC VESSEL WG COOK CALL SIGN 5BPC2  IS CONDUCTINING SEISIMIC SURVEY IN AREAS BOUNDED BY:

SEISMIC OPERATIONS AREA:
A  72-16.2N 033-35.8E
B  73-00.7N 034-41.3E
C  73-06.2N 036-00.1E
D  72-02.1N 034-21.7E

SEA EQUIPMENT MAINTAINANCE AREA:
A 73-41.1N 036-50.4E
B 73-44.7N 021-26.4E
C 71-48.3N 021-23.4E
D 71-42.8N 033-54.7E

WG COOK IS TOWING 10 SEISMIC STREAMERS 4.5 NM IN LENGHT MARKED BY YELLOW TAIL BUOYS WITH FLASHING LIGHTS.
ALL SHIPS ARE REQUESTED TO GIVE A WIDE BERTH OF 7 NM CPA.
GUARD VESSEL AQUARIUS CALL SIGN HP8937 AND SUPPLY VESSEL MARISKA G CALL SIGN HO 7662 IN ATTENDANCE.
WG COOK IS MONITORING VHF CH. 16,69 AND 72.
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 32/14
